title: icy applesauce-glazed slovakian pork wrap
description: a delicious and healthy slovakian dish featuring applesauce-glazed pork, crunchy yuzu-cure, and fresh herbs wrapped in ti-leaf wraps, perfect for a quick and easy meal prep
instructions: season the pork loin with salt and pepper
in a small bowl, mix together applesauce, yuzu juice, and honey
brush the applesauce mixture onto both sides of the pork loin
place the pork loin on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
bake for 20 minutes or until cooked through
while the pork is baking, prepare the yuzu-cure by mixing together yuzu juice and mustard
set aside to use as a glaze
once the pork is cooked, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly
warm the ti-leaf wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds
assembled the wraps by spreading a layer of yuzu-cure on the bottom of each wrap, followed by a few slices of the pork, some parsley and dill, and finally a drizzle of additional yuzu-cure
